Headline: #4 Cottage Grove Temporary Northbound Reroute near 87th/Cottage Grove.
ShortDescription: Northbound 4 Cottage Grove buses are temporarily rerouted due to street blockage near 87th/Cottage Grove.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Northbound #4 Cottage Grove buses are temporarily rerouted via Cottage Grove, 87th, King Drive, 83rd, Cottage Grove and over normal route, due to street blockage near 87th/Cottage Grove.

Southbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.
